508: export async function processWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
509:   const claimed = await claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
510:   if (!claimed) {
511:     const existing = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
512:     if (existing && existing.status !== 'queued' && existing.status !== 'running') {
513:       try {
514:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
515:       } catch (reconcileError) {
516:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
517:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
518:         }
519:       }
520:       return;
521:     }
522: 
523:     if (existing?.status === 'queued' && existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
524:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
525:       return;
526:     }
527: 
528:     if (existing?.status === 'running') {
529:       if (existing.cancelRequestedAt) {
530:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
531:         return;
532:       }
533: 
534:       if (isRunningDeploymentStale(existing.startedAt)) {
535:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
536:           workspaceId,
537:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
538:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
539:         });
540:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
541:           workspaceId,
542:           deploymentId,
543:           eventType: 'deployment_failed',
544:           payload: {
545:             code: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
546:             message: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
547:           },
548:         });
549:         await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
550:           deploymentId,
551:           status: 'failed',
552:           errorCode: 'deployment_stale_timeout',
553:           errorMessage: 'Deployment execution exceeded stale running timeout and was failed for recovery',
554:         });
555:         return;
556:       }
557: 
558:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment is already running; defer redelivery');
559:     }
560:     return;
561:   }
562: 
563:   try {
564:     const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
565:     if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
566:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
567:         workspaceId,
568:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
569:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
570:       });
571:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
572:         workspaceId,
573:         deploymentId,
574:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
575:         payload: { code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled', message: 'Workspace deploy is disabled' },
576:       });
577:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
578:         deploymentId,
579:         status: 'failed',
580:         errorCode: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
581:         errorMessage: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
582:       });
583:       return;
584:     }
585: 
586:     await executeWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
587:   } catch (error) {
588:     const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
589:     if (deployment && deployment.status !== 'queued' && deployment.status !== 'running') {
590:       try {
591:         await reconcileWorkspaceSummaryForTerminalDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
592:       } catch (reconcileError) {
593:         if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(reconcileError)) {
594:           throw new QueueRetryError('Terminal deployment reconciliation failed; retry requested');
595:         }
596:       }
597:       return;
598:     }
599: 
600:     if (error instanceof CancelRequestedError || deployment?.cancelRequestedAt) {
601:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
602:       return;
603:     }
604: 
605:     if (error instanceof PolicyError) {
606:       const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
607:         (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
608:         true
609:       );
610:       const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
611: 
612:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
613:         workspaceId,
614:         errorCode: error.code,
615:         errorMessage: error.message,
616:         result: { rollback },
617:       });
618:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
619:         workspaceId,
620:         deploymentId,
621:         eventType: 'deployment_failed',
622:         payload: { code: error.code, message: error.message, rollback },
623:       });
624:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
625:         deploymentId,
626:         status: 'failed',
627:         errorCode: error.code,
628:         errorMessage: error.message,
629:       });
630:       return;
631:     }
632: 
633:     const attemptCount = deployment?.attemptCount ?? 0;
634:     const maxRetries = deployment?.maxRetries ?? 0;
635:     if ((error instanceof QueueRetryError || isTransientFailure(error)) && attemptCount <= maxRetries) {
636:       const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
637:       if (latest?.cancelRequestedAt) {
638:         await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
639:         return;
640:       }
641: 
642:       await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
643:         workspaceId,
644:         startedAt: null,
645:         finishedAt: null,
646:         errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
647:         errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
648:       });
649:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
650:         workspaceId,
651:         deploymentId,
652:         eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
653:         payload: { attemptCount, maxRetries },
654:       });
655:       throw new QueueRetryError('Workspace deployment transient failure; retry requested');
656:     }
657: 
658:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
659:     const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(
660:       (await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId))?.rollbackOnFailure,
661:       true
662:     );
663:     const rollback = await resolveRollbackContextSafely(workspaceId, deploymentId, rollbackOnFailure, env);
664: 
665:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'failed', {
666:       workspaceId,
667:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
668:       errorMessage: message,
669:       result: { rollback },
670:     });
671:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
672:       workspaceId,
673:       deploymentId,
674:       eventType: 'deployment_failed',
675:       payload: {
676:         code: 'deployment_failed',
677:         message,
678:         rollback,
679:       },
680:     });
681:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(env.DB, workspaceId, {
682:       deploymentId,
683:       status: 'failed',
684:       errorCode: 'deployment_failed',
685:       errorMessage: message,
686:     });
687:   }
688: }

690: export async function runWorkspaceDeploymentInlineWithRetries(
691:   env: Env,
692:   workspaceId: string,
693:   deploymentId: string,
694:   maxCycles = 8
695: ): Promise<void> {
696:   async function recoverInlineRunningDeployment(): Promise<boolean> {
697:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
698:     if (!latest || latest.status !== 'running') {
699:       return false;
700:     }
701: 
702:     if (latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
703:       await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
704:       return true;
705:     }
706: 
707:     if (latest.attemptCount > latest.maxRetries) {
708:       return false;
709:     }
710: 
711:     await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'queued', {
712:       workspaceId,
713:       startedAt: null,
714:       finishedAt: null,
715:       errorCode: 'retry_scheduled',
716:       errorMessage: 'Recovered inline deployment retry after transient failure',
717:     });
718:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
719:       workspaceId,
720:       deploymentId,
721:       eventType: 'deployment_retry_scheduled',
722:       payload: { attemptCount: latest.attemptCount, maxRetries: latest.maxRetries, recoveredInline: true },
723:     });
724:     return true;
725:   }
726: 
727:   for (let cycle = 0; cycle < maxCycles; cycle += 1) {
728:     let retryableErrorRaised = false;
729:     try {
730:       await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
731:     } catch (error) {
732:       if (error instanceof QueueRetryError && /already running; defer redelivery/i.test(error.message)) {
733:         try {
734:           const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
735:           if (latest?.status === 'running' && latest.cancelRequestedAt) {
736:             await markDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId, 'cancel_requested');
737:             continue;
738:           }
739:         } catch {
740:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
741:         }
742:         return;
743:       }
744: 
745:       if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
746:         retryableErrorRaised = true;
747:         try {
748:           const recovered = await recoverInlineRunningDeployment();
749:           if (recovered) {
750:             continue;
751:           }
752:         } catch {
753:           // Best-effort inline recovery only.
754:         }
755:       }
756:     }
757: 
758:     const latest = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
759:     if (!latest) {
760:       return;
761:     }
762:     if (latest.status !== 'queued') {
763:       return;
764:     }
765:     if (retryableErrorRaised) {
766:       continue;
767:     }
768:     if (latest.error?.code !== 'retry_scheduled') {
769:       return;
770:     }
771:   }
772: }

805: export function shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error: unknown): boolean {

parts.text:
Found one correctness issue worth fixing before merge.

- **High – workspace deployment summary can be overwritten by older concurrent deployments**  
  `updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary` unconditionally updates `workspaces.last_deployment_*` for any terminal deployment (`packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:2266`, `packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:2304`).  
  Because deployments are processed independently, two deployments on the same workspace can finish out of order. An older deployment finishing later can overwrite summary fields set by a newer deployment, causing inconsistent state (for example, `last_deployment_id/status` pointing to an older failed deployment after a newer one already succeeded).  
  Suggested fix: make summary update conditional on recency (e.g., only update if this deployment is the current `last_deployment_id`, or compare against the latest deployment `created_at`/`started_at` in SQL before writing).

I couldn’t run the worker tests locally because this environment has Node `v14.16.0` while the repo requires `>=20`.
